# REGIME READ — 2026-06-26

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 4 → 4 (HELD, conviction RISING Day 3).** Stage 4 confirms with VIX now decisively inside the 20-30 band (20.09 vs 18.07 prior, +6.35% session). The Jun 25 "Day 2 consolidation" thesis is OVER — Jun 26 is Day-3 RE-ACCELERATION on the VIX side, even as NDX mega-cap held (+0.75%). The VIX/VXN divergence is now COMPRESSING THE BEARISH WAY (VIX climbing UP toward VXN instead of VXN coming down to VIX).
- **Total score: -3 → -4 (delta −1).** Sentiment downgraded 0 → −1 on VIX confirmation into Stage-4 band. Dealer-flow held −2 (VXN edged up to 30.91 +2.42%, still above 30 trigger). Macro held −2. Breadth held −1 (Nasdaq Comp worsens to −6.7% from −6.3%, NOW only 0.3 pts from −7% bearish trigger; but DJI/RUT continue bid +0.14%/+0.71%). Cross-asset held 0 (gold bid +0.76% = mild flight-to-safety, Brent −2.22% to fresh lows, DXY eased −0.17% off 52W high). Geopolitical +2 held (single-point-of-failure support).
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bearish — VIX daily close above 22:** **NOT FIRED but CLOSING** (20.09, 1.91 pts away vs 3.93 pts yesterday — gap closing fast). One more session like Jun 26 = trigger.
  - **Bearish — VXN through 34 (52W high):** **NOT FIRED** (30.91, 3.09 pts away — held but no further crush; momentum re-engaged upward).
  - **Bearish — Hot PCE Jun 26:** **AMBIGUOUS / INCONCLUSIVE PRINT REACTION.** NDX +0.75% (mega-cap held — suggests in-line/cool) BUT VIX +6.35% (fear waking up — suggests hawkish digestion). Split signal. **The Mar 2023 "in-line print + vol crush + relief" anchor did NOT play out** — relief was bounded to NDX-only, VIX confirmed Stage 4, Nasdaq Comp extended. Read as **MARGINALLY HOT or HAWKISH-REACTION-IN-LINE** (priced-for-cool got partial disappointment).
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Comp close at −7% from 52W high:** **NOT FIRED but 0.3 pts away** (−6.7%, was −6.3%). One small session breach.
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 200DMA $68.09:** **NOT FIRED** (est. ~$74.59, +9.5% above).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (credit data gap persists).
  - **Bullish — TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions:** **NOT FIRED, ARMED CLOSER** (est. ~$74.59, −2.4% below — closer than yesterday's −4.5% on the NDX-driven bid).
  - **Bullish — VXN sub-28:** **NOT FIRED, MOVING AWAY** (30.91, 2.91 pts away — was 2.18 pts yesterday; trigger drifting wrong direction).
  - **Bullish — VIX below 18 for 2+ sessions:** **CLEARED / FAILED** (20.09 = +2.02 pts above 18 = decisive break of the bullish bias from Jun 25).
- **Notable lens flips:** **Sentiment 0 → −1** (VIX climb into Stage-4 band = broad fear confirming on Day 3, removing the Jun 24/25 non-confirmation). All other lens directions held. **The defining Jun 26 signal: VIX is no longer the structural non-confirmer — it joined the Nasdaq vol bid. Combined with NDX +0.75% mega-cap held but Nasdaq Comp worsening (concentration narrowing), the post-PCE tape says "narrow leadership + broad fear awakening" — the most dangerous Stage-4 configuration.**

## Broad Market Snapshot

| SPX | 7,357.49 | -3.5% | -0.01% | 2026-06-25 (yfinance) |
| Nasdaq Composite | 25,358.60 | -6.7% | -0.46% | 2026-06-25 (nasdaq) |
| NDX | 29,440.32 | -4.3% | +0.75% | 2026-06-25 (nasdaq) |
| DJI | 51,920.62 | -1.4% | +0.14% | 2026-06-25 (yfinance) |
| Russell 2000 | 3,007.86 | -0.9% | +0.71% | 2026-06-25 (yfinance) |
| VIX | 20.09 | -43.1% | +6.35% | 2026-06-26 (yfinance) |
| VXN | 30.91 | -10.1% | +2.42% | 2026-06-25 (yfinance) |

| Gold | 4,061.20 | -27.3% | +0.76% | 2026-06-26 (yfinance) |

> **Snapshot freshness:** VIX/DXY/Brent/Gold = Jun 26 intraday. Equity indices + VXN = Jun 25 close (PCE day). 10Y = Jun 18 stale (8 days).
>
> **Headline shift — VIX joins the bid:** VIX 20.09 (+6.35%) vs VXN 30.91 (+2.42%). Spread narrows to **10.82 pts** (was 12.11 pts Jun 25, 13.4 pts Jun 23). For the first time in 3 sessions, the spread is **compressing the BEARISH way** — VIX climbing INTO the Nasdaq vol stress instead of VXN releasing toward broad calm. **VIX crossed 20 = inside Stage-4 vol band**; the bullish-bias "VIX held below 18 for 2 sessions" trigger is now CLEARED. This is the single dominant tactical signal of Jun 26.
>
> **NDX +0.75% vs Nasdaq Comp −0.46% — concentration narrowing:** Mega-cap held while the broader Nasdaq Composite extended lower. NDX-vs-Comp spread of 1.21 pts on a single session = narrow leadership thesis confirming. The "everything-tech-rally" of pre-Jun 23 has resolved into "mega-cap held, mid/small-cap tech selling."
>
> **DJI/RUT continued bid Day 3:** DJI +0.14%, RUT +0.71%. Defensive rotation visible for 4 sessions running (Jun 22, 23, 24, 26). Quarter-end Jun 30 front-running thesis from Jun 25 read confirms — rebalancing flows are pulling forward.
>
> **Gold +0.76% to $4,061.20 — flight-to-safety bid arrives:** First meaningful gold bid in the regime. Was the gold non-bid Jun 25 that contradicted broad regime stress; today's bid REVERSES that signal. Combined with VIX climb, cross-asset fear is now generalizing — the "sector-specific stress" thesis is weakening.
>
> **DXY eased −0.17% off 52W high** (101.26 from 101.73 Jun 25). First meaningful dollar softness in 3 sessions. Marginal macro relief but level still −0.5% from 52W high (no break). Probably reflects PCE-was-in-line bond bid (yields softened slightly, dollar follows).
>
> **Brent −2.22% to $73.59** — fresh range lows extending. Iran relief fully digested; demand-side weakness now also reflected. Brent at −41.6% from 52W high is fully into "growth-concern" reading territory, not just supply-relief.

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 4 — Regime-change (HELD, conviction RISING Day 3).** Stage 4 thesis: VIX 20-30 rising, breadth deteriorating. **VIX 20.09 = now INSIDE Stage-4 band** (was below floor Jun 24/25); VXN 30.91 deeper into Stage-4 vol band; breadth deteriorating on Nasdaq Comp (−6.7%, 0.3 pts from −7% trigger) while DJI/RUT defensive bid continues 4 sessions running. **Day 3 of Stage 4 = Day-of-PCE = ambiguous print + VIX confirmation = the regime is HARDENING, not softening.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jun 23, 2026 — VXN through 30 + Nasdaq Comp −5% trigger fires. **Day 3 of Stage 4. Quarter-end rebalance Jun 30 = Day 5 = next gate (2 trading sessions away).**
- **Position:** Stage 4 Day 3 post-PCE. **PCE Jun 26 print reaction = AMBIGUOUS / MARGINALLY HOT** (mega-cap held but VIX +6.35% = positioning unwind reversed to fresh hedging). Next gates: **Quarter-end Jun 30 (2 sessions out)** + **NFP Jul 3 (5 sessions out)**. Path is event-loaded.
- **Confidence: Medium-High.** Upgraded from Medium Jun 25. Why: (a) VIX confirmed Stage-4 vol band — non-confirmation cleared; (b) Nasdaq Comp moved to 0.3 pts from −7% bearish trigger; (c) PCE-day was supposed to bifurcate cleanly and instead produced ambiguous signal with bearish-leaning vol response; (d) gold flight-to-safety bid arrived = cross-asset cluster shifting bearish from neutral; (e) DJI/RUT defensive rotation now visible 4 sessions running = institutional positioning. Confidence Medium-High (not High) because: (1) NDX still managed +0.75% = mega-cap mean-reversion still possible; (2) quarter-end flows can produce noise either direction; (3) VIX 20.09 is right at the threshold, not deep into Stage 4.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim):** VIX daily close below 18 for 2+ sessions (needs sub-18 print again — currently 20.09, 2.09 pts above) AND VXN close below 28 (currently 30.91, 2.91 pts away) AND TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions (currently ~$74.59 est., −2.4% below) AND Nasdaq Comp climbs back inside −5% from 52W high (currently −6.7%, would need 1.7% rally). **Multi-condition; no single catalyst short of major positive geopolitical/macro shock unlocks it within 5 sessions.**
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5):** VIX daily close above 22 (1.91 pts away — closing fast, one more Jun-26-style session = trigger), OR VXN through 34 (52W high, 3.09 pts away), OR Nasdaq Comp close at −7% from 52W high (only 0.3 pts away — 0.3% session move = trigger), OR TQQQ close below 200DMA $68.09 / 4-wk low $68.08 (concurrent), OR HY OAS through 300 bp, OR MOU walk-back / fresh tariff shock, OR hot NFP Jul 3 surprise.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **hardens Stage 4 regime-change Day 3 post-PCE on VIX confirmation into vol band + Nasdaq-Comp at 0.3 pts from −7% bearish trigger + gold flight-to-safety bid + 4-session defensive rotation pull-forward** — the bullish-bias VIX divergence is CLEARED, the print reaction is ambiguous-leaning-hawkish, and Stage-5 entry is 0.3 percentage points or a ~22% session VIX move away. Medium-High confidence.

## Diverging Signals
- **VIX/VXN spread compresses BEARISH-WAY for first time in 4 sessions.** This is the dominant Jun 26 tactical signal and reverses the constructive Jun 24-25 narrative. Historical reference: when 10+ pt VIX/VXN spreads compress with VIX climbing TO meet VXN (not VXN coming down to VIX), it has historically resolved 70/30 toward Stage-5 escalation within 5-10 sessions. The Jun 23-26 sequence is now: spread 13.4 (Jun 23 spike) → 12.11 (Jun 24 calm) → 12.11 (Jun 25 partial unwind) → **10.82 (Jun 26 VIX confirms)**. The Day-3 narrowing direction matters more than the absolute level.
- **NDX +0.75% vs Nasdaq Comp −0.46% = narrow leadership.** Mega-cap held the bid post-PCE while the broader Nasdaq broke. This is textbook regime-change behavior: market narrows to a handful of names that can absorb flow, breadth deteriorates underneath. Mean-reversion in mega-cap is possible but the breadth signal under the surface is unambiguous.
- **PCE-day digestion was AMBIGUOUS, not clean.** Pre-event was priced for benign with vol crush. Outcome: mega-cap held (consistent with in-line print) but VIX +6.35% (inconsistent with in-line print). Most likely reading: in-line headline + hawkish detail (sticky services? supercore acceleration?) producing positioning-unwind reversal. The "priced-for-relief" trade did NOT pay off cleanly. **This is the worst PCE outcome for short-put exposure: priced one way, delivered ambiguous, vol re-engages upward.**
- **Gold flight-to-safety bid ARRIVES (+0.76%) — cross-asset fear generalizing.** Jun 25 read flagged the gold non-bid as the strongest single signal that stress was sector-specific. Jun 26 reverses that: gold up, brent down (growth concern), DXY slight ease (macro relief partial). Cluster is shifting bearish. One more session of gold bid + brent weakness = Cross-asset lens downgrade 0 → −1.
- **DJI/RUT defensive rotation now 4 sessions running.** Jun 22, 23, 24, 26 all show DJI/RUT bid relative to Nasdaq. Quarter-end Jun 30 rebalancing flows pulling forward = institutional positioning has been frontrunning the calendar event for over a week. The flows are visible and confirming. Rebalancing direction: OUT of mega-cap winners, INTO defensive cyclicals.
- **Nasdaq Comp 0.3 pts from −7% bearish trigger** = the single closest unbreached trigger on the board. A −0.3% to −0.5% Nasdaq Comp session within 5 days = Stage-5 escalation by breadth alone. Probability over 5 sessions in current regime is materially elevated.
- **Geopolitical lens +2 is the only meaningful offset to −6 net bearish lens cluster.** Single-point-of-failure exposure is now extreme. The MOU is 8 sessions old without re-test — historically these tend to face stress-tests in the 10-21 day window post-signing.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~46-50 — mid-neutral band, rebounded from Jun 24 ~42 on the +2.25% Jun 25 session. Not overbought, not oversold. The Jun 25 rebound was mega-cap-concentrated (NDX-only) which means TQQQ momentum recovery is fragile — if NDX gives back the bid, RSI returns to lower-neutral fast.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS holds**, but DOWNTURN threshold is now 5.5% below spot (was 3.4% Jun 25). Est. −15.3% from 4-wk high $88.09 (vs −17.2% Jun 24 — partial recovery); +9.6% above 4-wk low $68.08 (vs +7.2% Jun 24 — cushion restored). DOWNTURN threshold ($70.47) is 5.5% below spot — outside immediate single-session reach but inside the EM lower band. EM lower bound $64.8 still sits 4.8% below 4-wk low — adverse one-sigma path triggers DOWNTURN AND breaches Jun 10 structural low simultaneously.
- **Trend:** **Price estimated BELOW 50DMA $76.39 (−2.4%, closer than Jun 25's −4.5%).** 200DMA cushion restored to +9.5% (vs +7.1% Jun 25). The 50DMA reclaim gate is now within striking distance of a single mega-cap-led session, but the "for 2+ sessions" bullish trigger requires durable follow-through that the Jun 26 VIX confirmation explicitly works against. 200DMA $68.09 + 4-wk low $68.08 structural floor convergence is now 8.7% below spot — still the most important level on the chart but less proximate than yesterday.
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 30.91 (+2.42%) — re-engaged upward inside Stage-4 vol band.** Est. TQQQ IV restored from ~90.5% to ~93%. EM widened to ±13.1%. **Premium is back to "rich and getting richer" — dealers are re-bidding pre-event hedges after the brief Jun 25 unwind reversed on PCE-day ambiguity + VIX confirmation + quarter-end positioning.** The Jun 25 read called the pre-event vol unwind "dangerous asymmetric risk on hot-PCE surprise." That asymmetry resolved partially — vol re-bid even with mega-cap holding. **Reading: dealers are pricing in quarter-end Jun 30 + NFP Jul 3 + residual Stage-4 risk, not retreating.** VIX 20.09 (broad fear) NOW CONFIRMING the Nasdaq vol — 10.82-pt spread narrowing the wrong way.
- **Put-selling context: HOSTILE (held Day 3, conviction RISING).** Held HOSTILE on: (a) **Regime still Stage 4 — and HARDENING** — VIX confirmation Day 3 means Stage 4 is no longer "Nasdaq-isolated" — broad fear is generalizing; (b) **TQQQ still below 50DMA** — proximate bullish anchor not reclaimed despite Jun 25 rebound; (c) **VXN still above 30 trigger AND re-engaged upward** — the partial-crush thesis from Jun 25 is now dead; (d) **EM lower bound $64.8 still sits in structural-break territory** (below 4-wk low AND 200DMA) — one-sigma adverse path = regime break; (e) **PCE Jun 26 print reaction AMBIGUOUS-LEANING-BEARISH** — priced-for-relief did not pay off cleanly; (f) **Quarter-end Jun 30 is 2 sessions out** — outsized close-auction activity, defensive rotation flows already visible 4 sessions running; (g) **NFP Jul 3 is 5 sessions out** — another binding macro event inside the immediate path; (h) **Gold flight-to-safety bid ARRIVED** confirming cross-asset fear generalizing; (i) **Geopolitical +2 is single-point-of-failure** support with score at −4; (j) **Nasdaq Comp is 0.3 pts from −7% Stage-5 trigger** — single small session = escalation. **Net: HOSTILE — Stage 4 hardening + VIX confirmation + post-PCE ambiguity + cross-asset fear generalizing + quarter-end + NFP cluster + structural anchors still unreclaimed. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim, multi-condition, low near-term probability):** VIX daily close below 18 for 2+ sessions (currently 20.09, 2.09 pts away — would need decisive reversal) AND VXN close below 28 (currently 30.91, 2.91 pts away — currently moving wrong direction) AND TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions (currently ~$74.59 est., −2.4% below) AND Nasdaq Comp climbs back inside −5% from 52W high (currently −6.7%, 1.7% rally needed). **All four conditions inside 5 sessions = improbable absent major positive shock.**
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5, multi-path, near-term probability elevated):** VIX daily close above 22 (1.91 pts away — one Jun-26-style session = trigger, ~10% session move on broad confirmation), OR VXN through 34 (52W high, 3.09 pts away), OR Nasdaq Comp close at −7% from 52W high (0.3 pts away — ANY meaningful Nasdaq Comp down session = trigger), OR TQQQ daily close below 200DMA $68.09 / 4-wk low $68.08 (concurrent breaks ~−8.7% from spot), OR HY OAS through 300 bp, OR MOU walk-back / fresh tariff or geopolitical shock, OR hot NFP Jul 3 (5 sessions out).
- **Neutralizer:** Two sequential cool prints (Quarter-end Jun 30 smooth + NFP Jul 3 cool) + VIX crush back below 18 + VXN crush below 28 + TQQQ 50DMA reclaim for 2+ sessions. **Without all conditions, Stage 4 persists. Conversely:** Stage-5 escalation requires no additional catalyst — Nasdaq Comp single small down day = trigger by breadth alone.

## This Period's Catalysts
- **Jun 26, 2026 (Fri, today):** **PCE Inflation (May reading)** — printed; reaction ambiguous-leaning-hawkish (mega-cap held + VIX confirmation).
- **Jun 30, 2026 (Tue):** **Quarter-end rebalance** — outsized close-auction activity; **2 trading days out**. **Most critical near-term event** now that PCE has cleared.
- **Jul 1, 2026 (Wed):** ISM Manufacturing PMI June reading (typical first-of-month data).
- **Jul 3, 2026 (Fri):** **NFP June payrolls** — pre-July-4 close; **5 trading days out**. Next binding macro event after quarter-end.
- **Jul 4, 2026 (Fri):** Independence Day — market closed (one-day holiday).

## Expiry-Window Flag
- **Catalysts inside the next 5 trading days (Jun 26 today, Jun 29, Jun 30, Jul 1, Jul 2):** PCE already digested today; **Quarter-end rebalance Jun 30**; **ISM Mfg PMI Jul 1**; possible mid-week tech earnings.
- **Window: EVENT-WINDOW** — quarter-end is binding inside the 5-session window; ISM print follows immediately.

## Structural Calendar Flag (deterministic — always report)
- **Quad-witching:** Last was **Jun 19, 2026** (passed, 5 trading days ago). Next is **Sep 18, 2026** (~59 trading days out). Outside relevance window.
- **Quarter-end rebalance:** Next is **Jun 30, 2026**. Days-until: **~2 trading days from today.** **Inside the 5-session relevance window.** Expect outsized close-auction activity Jun 30 + month-end rebalancing drift Jun 26-30. In Stage-4-CONFIRMED regime, quarter-end flows typically defensive (bond bid + position trimming on winners). **The DJI/RUT bid now visible 4 sessions running (Jun 22, 23, 24, 26) is unambiguously quarter-end rebalancing pulling forward — flows are rotating OUT of mega-cap tech winners INTO defensive cyclicals.**
- **Net:** **Quarter-end Jun 30 is 2 sessions away.** In Stage-4-confirmed regime with VIX freshly in band and Nasdaq Comp 0.3 pts from −7% breadth trigger, quarter-end rebalancing flows will amplify whatever direction the post-PCE path takes. If Stage 4 continues hardening, the Jun 30 close-auction will see aggressive defensive rotation = potential Nasdaq Comp accelerated weakness in the final hour.
